text:
……お疲れ様。
とても有意義な探索が出来た、と思う。

……見たことがない、ものだらけね。
違う歴史を感じられる余裕はあった。
それは私も成長できてる証だと思う。

……貴方も、何か見つけることが
出来たかしら。
それだと嬉しい。

Excellent work. I found that exploration...
quite worthwhile.

Surrounded by the unfamiliar, we still had time
to take in some of this world's history.
I feel that is... a sign of my own growth.

Perhaps you were able to find something
valuable as well. I hope so.

Goodbye for now. I hope to work
with you again.
